results.title: React Native Document Scanner
results.description: A fast, native React Native document scanner that uses Apple VisionKit on iOS and Google ML Kit on Android, featuring automatic document detection, edge/perspective correction, multi-page scanning, and support for React Native's new architecture.

results.title: Flutter Doc Scanner
results.description: A Flutter plugin for document scanning on Android, iOS, and Web, leveraging ML Kit Document Scanner API and VisionKit for high-quality digitization, accurate detection, and flexible editing.
